steps.title: Translate the point values
steps.content: The $x$ questions are worth $1$ point each, so they contribute $x$ points. The $y$ questions are worth $2$ points each, so they contribute $2y$ points.

steps.title: Write the total
steps.content: The assignment is worth $34$ points total, so the point contributions must add to $34$. $$x+2y=34$$ The answer is D.
